# Implement_BetterBWMatching in Assembly

I'll solve the BetterBWMatching problem from Rosalind using assembly language. This problem involves implementing a more efficient version of Burrows-Wheeler Matching that uses precomputed data structures.

## Problem Understanding

BetterBWMatching is an optimization of the standard BWMatching algorithm that uses:
1. Counting arrays for each symbol
2. First occurrence array
3. Efficient range queries

## Assembly Implementation

```assembly
.section .data
    # Input data structures
    bwt_string: .ascii "
